extensions.name: Word Count
extensions.description: Word count, line count, and reading time in the status bar.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: JSON Formatter
extensions.description: Format, validate, and minify JSON with Mod+Shift+J / Mod+Shift+M.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: JSDoc Generator
extensions.description: Generate JSDoc comments for functions with Mod+Shift+D.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Color Preview
extensions.description: Inline color swatches in the gutter for hex/rgb/hsl values.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Bracket Colorizer
extensions.description: Colors matching brackets by nesting depth with 4-color cycling.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: TODO Explorer
extensions.description: Sidebar panel listing TODO/FIXME/HACK comments with click-to-navigate.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: File Size Indicator
extensions.description: Status bar showing file size, line count, char count with large file warnings.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Git Blame Inline
extensions.description: Shows git blame annotation at end of current line with author and time.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Indent Rainbow
extensions.description: Colors indentation levels with subtle background stripes.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Auto Close Tag
extensions.description: Auto-completes closing HTML/JSX tags when typing.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Snippet Manager
extensions.description: Save, organize, and insert code snippets from a sidebar panel.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Minimap
extensions.description: Zoomed-out code overview on the right edge of the editor. Click to jump.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
extensions.description: Insert placeholder text via right-click menu or Mod+Shift+L.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: CSS Unit Converter
extensions.description: Hover on px values to see rem/em/vw/% conversions. Click to replace.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Import Sorter
extensions.description: Sort and group import statements with Mod+Shift+I.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Regex Tester
extensions.description: Sidebar panel with live regex testing, match highlighting, and capture groups.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Character Counter
extensions.description: Status bar showing selection stats: chars, words, lines selected.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Duplicate Line Finder
extensions.description: Find and highlight duplicate lines with Mod+Shift+U.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Env File Syntax
extensions.description: Highlights .env files with masked secrets. Click to reveal.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Timestamp Converter
extensions.description: Inline Unix timestamp preview + right-click to insert timestamps.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Project Stats Dashboard
extensions.description: Virtual tab showing files, lines, language breakdown, largest files, dependencies.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Console Log Helper
extensions.description: Mod+Shift+C inserts console.log, Mod+Shift+X removes all console logs.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: API Playground
extensions.description: Built-in HTTP client — send requests, see responses, save history.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Diff Clipboard
extensions.description: Compare clipboard content against current file with Mod+Shift+V.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Code Screenshot
extensions.description: Copy selected code as a styled PNG screenshot to clipboard.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Dependency Graph
extensions.description: Interactive import/require dependency visualization in a virtual tab.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Terminal Command Palette
extensions.description: Quick-launch npm scripts and common commands with Mod+Shift+T.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Focus Mode & Pomodoro
extensions.description: Distraction-free mode with built-in pomodoro timer. Mod+Shift+F.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: AI Code Review
extensions.description: Select code → AI reviews for bugs, performance, security issues.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Multi-Cursor Bookmarks
extensions.description: Bookmark cursor positions across files. Sidebar panel + Mod+Shift+B.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Code Runner
extensions.description: Run code files in 20+ languages with Ctrl+Alt+N. Auto-detect executor.
extensions.author: PiPilot

extensions.name: Online Compiler
extensions.description: Compile & run 60+ languages online via OneCompiler API. Free 50 runs, then bring your own key.
extensions.author: PiPilot
